changeSet.author: healthdata
changeSet.comment: Create patient schema for patient-related tables
changeSet.sql: CREATE SCHEMA IF NOT EXISTS patient;
changeSet.rollback: DROP SCHEMA IF NOT EXISTS patient CASCADE;

changeSet.author: healthdata
changeSet.comment: Create fhir schema for FHIR resource tables
changeSet.sql: CREATE SCHEMA IF NOT EXISTS fhir;
changeSet.rollback: DROP SCHEMA IF NOT EXISTS fhir CASCADE;

changeSet.author: healthdata
changeSet.comment: Create quality schema for quality measure and health score tables
changeSet.sql: CREATE SCHEMA IF NOT EXISTS quality;
changeSet.rollback: DROP SCHEMA IF NOT EXISTS quality CASCADE;

changeSet.author: healthdata
changeSet.comment: Create caregap schema for care gap and intervention tables
changeSet.sql: CREATE SCHEMA IF NOT EXISTS caregap;
changeSet.rollback: DROP SCHEMA IF NOT EXISTS caregap CASCADE;

changeSet.author: healthdata
changeSet.comment: Create notification schema for notification templates and history
changeSet.sql: CREATE SCHEMA IF NOT EXISTS notification;
changeSet.rollback: DROP SCHEMA IF NOT EXISTS notification CASCADE;

changeSet.author: healthdata
changeSet.comment: Create audit schema for audit logs and compliance tracking
changeSet.sql: CREATE SCHEMA IF NOT EXISTS audit;
changeSet.rollback: DROP SCHEMA IF NOT EXISTS audit CASCADE;

changeSet.author: healthdata
changeSet.comment: Enable uuid-ossp extension for UUID generation
